prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial opens in a very dark interior space. A large, bright, grid-like window or glass wall is visible in the background, while the rest of the scene is mostly in shadow. A human figure appears as a dark silhouette near the right side of the lit background, but details are indistinct.

By the next sampled frame, the image becomes brighter and appears to use a layered or superimposed visual effect. A man in the foreground, wearing what looks like a dark short-sleeved work shirt, faces the camera. His facial details are soft and partly blurred. Behind or overlaid with him is a large interior lobby-like space with a shiny floor, the same tall windowed background, and several silhouetted people moving or standing at different depths in the scene. The visual composition gives the impression of activity inside a spacious building, though the exact actions are not fully clear.

In the final frame, the setting is clearer: an overhead or elevated view of a polished lobby or entrance hall with large illuminated windows at the far end. Several people appear as dark silhouettes walking or standing in the space. A large UPS shield logo is centered near the lower middle of the frame. Beneath it, large white text reads “SATURDAY DELIVERY.” Smaller text underneath reads: “See Air Service Guide For Guarantee Details.” The overall lighting remains dramatic, with strong contrast between the bright window area and the dark interior floor and figures.
